title: elymus thoroldianus
intro: Elymus thoroldianus, also known as Thorold's wheat-grass or Elymus, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elymus thoroldianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Elymus thoroldianus is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, and is often used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties.
